BOLT.notes: PRIORITY: #341 Cloudflare Load Balancer — code/config side only. Deliverable: docs/migration/cloudflare-lb.md with (1) origin pool 'hetzner-primary' (origin: jvsatnik.cz via tunnel, weight 1, health check: GET /api/health expects 200 + body contains '"ok":true', interval 30s, consecutive failures 2); (2) origin pool 'vercel-standby' (origin: janicka-shop.vercel.app, weight 1, enabled=false initially); (3) LB 'jvsatnik.cz-lb' fallback_pool=vercel-standby, default_pools=[hetzner-primary], session affinity 'ip_cookie'; (4) notification: Telegram via existing /api/alerts/uptime. Include exact cf-terraforming-style JSON/YAML blocks bectly can paste into CF dashboard. NO secrets committed. THEN #343 DNS/LB traffic shift plan — docs/migration/dns-shift.md with pre-flight checks, rollback steps, metric thresholds (p95 <800ms, 5xx <0.5%), 10%/50%/100% weights with observation windows. NO actual DNS edits. THEN #65 NEXT_PUBLIC_SITE_URL — audit all absolute-URL emitters (og:url, canonical, sitemap.ts, robots.ts, email templates, /api/feed/*) and ensure they derive from env.NEXT_PUBLIC_SITE_URL; add Czech slug→canonical redirects in next.config redirects (e.g., /kosik→/cart not needed if Czech already canonical; invert only if legacy paths exist — audit first, don't speculate). Bolt owns all Hetzner migration code paths — others don't touch.

Scope: (1) frame-src CSP correctness — only jarvis-janicka.jvsatnik.cz, no wildcards, verify in middleware/next.config CSP source; (2) frame-ancestors on /admin/jarvis parent so the page can't be re-framed; (3) iframe sandbox attrs minimum-privilege; (4) CF Access JWT propagation to the embedded Claude UI — admin must re-auth at the tunnel boundary, no implicit trust; (5) referrer-policy doesn't leak /admin/jarvis pathname to the iframe origin; (6) cookies SameSite on parent NextAuth session; (7) audit log integrity for /api/admin/jarvis if still active — userId/userEmail not null, no PII in stderr; (8) confirm jarvis-terminal.tsx + xterm deps fully purged (commit f91c6f2 says deleted — verify). Deliverable: docs/security/jarvis-bridge-audit.md with findings + severity + fix proposals. THEN #330 nginx hardening (docs/migration/nginx/janicka-shop.conf) — CSP frame-src comgate.eu, rate limits, 20M cap scoped to /api/uploadthing*, X-Forwarded-* sanitization, TLS 1.2+.
